sentences.target: Wir retten die Katze vom Baum.

translations.de: Wir retten die Katze vom Baum.
translations.en: We’re rescuing the cat from the tree.
translations.es: Estamos rescatando al gato del árbol.
translations.fr: On descend le chat de l'arbre.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在把猫从树上救下来。
translations.yue: 我哋喺棵樹上救緊隻貓落嚟。
translations.pt: Estamos resgatando o gato da árvore.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang cứu con mèo khỏi cây.
translations.nl: We halen de kat uit de boom.
translations.hi: हम पेड़ से बिल्ली को नीचे उतार रहे हैं.
translations.el: Κατεβάζουμε τη γάτα από το δέντρο.
translations.nb: Vi redder katten ned fra treet.
translations.id: Kami sedang menurunkan kucing dari pohon.
translations.sv: Vi räddar ner katten från trädet.
translations.da: Vi får katten ned fra træet.
translations.ja: 木から猫を降ろしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person plural agreeing with 'Wir'; predicates the rescue action.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Katze' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'retten'.
Preposition (contraction of 'von dem'), governs dative; introduces the prepositional phrase indicating source/location.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'vom'.

translations.vi: Nhân viên cứu hộ đang cứu đứa trẻ.
translations.hi: लाइफगार्ड बच्चे को बचा रहे हैं.
translations.id: Para penjaga kolam menyelamatkan anak itu.
translations.ja: 監視員が子どもを助けतेいる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of the subject noun 'Bademeister'.
Common noun, nominative plural; subject performing the action.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural agreeing with 'Die Bademeister'.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Kind' as direct object.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object of 'retten'.

sentences.target: Ich versuche mein Handy zu retten.

translations.de: Ich versuche mein Handy zu retten.
translations.en: I’m trying to save my phone.
translations.it: Sto cercando di salvare il mio telefono.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正想办法救我的手机。
translations.he: אני מנסה להציל את הטלפון שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang cố cứu điện thoại của mình.
translations.nl: Ik probeer mijn telefoon te redden.
translations.hi: मैं अपना फोन बचाने की कोशिश कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Προσπαθώ να σώσω το κινητό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg prøver å redde mobilen min.
translations.id: Saya sedang berusaha menyelamatkan ponsel saya.
translations.da: Jeg prøver at redde min telefon.
translations.ja: スマホを救おうとしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of 'versuche'.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a 'zu'-infinitive complement ('retten').
Possessive determiner, neuter accusative singular; modifies 'Handy' and encodes 1st person singular possessor.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object of the embedded infinitive 'retten'.
Infinitival particle marking the non-finite complement of 'versuche'.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of 'versuche'; takes 'Handy' as its direct object.

sentences.target: Zum Glück retten die Sanitäter den Radfahrer.
sentences.reading: /tsʊm ɡlʏk ˈʁɛtən diː zaniˈtɛːtɐ deːn ˈʁaːtfaːʁɐ/

translations.de: Zum Glück retten die Sanitäter den Radfahrer.
translations.ipa: /tsʊm ɡlʏk ˈʁɛtən diː zaniˈtɛːtɐ deːn ˈʁaːtfaːʁɐ/
translations.en: Luckily, the paramedics rescue the cyclist.
translations.es: Por suerte, los paramédicos rescatan al ciclista.
translations.fr: Heureusement, les ambulanciers sauvent le cycliste.
translations.it: Per fortuna, i paramedici salvano il ciclista.
translations.ko: 다행히 구급대원들이 자전거 타는 사람을 구하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 幸好，急救人员救了骑车的人。
translations.yue: 好在救護員救緊個單車手。
translations.pt: Por sorte, os paramédicos resgatam o ciclista.
translations.he: למזלנו, הפרמדיקים מצילים את רוכב האופניים.
translations.vi: May mà các nhân viên cấp cứu đang cứu người đi xe đạp.
translations.ar: لحسن الحظ، المسعفون ينقذون راكب الدراجة.
translations.nl: Gelukkig redden de ambulancemedewerkers de fietser.
translations.hu: Szerencsére a mentősök megmentik a kerékpárost.
translations.hi: खुशकिस्मती से, पैरामेडिक साइकिल सवार को बचा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Na szczęście ratownicy medyczni ratują rowerzystę.
translations.el: Ευτυχώς, οι διασώστες σώζουν τον ποδηλάτη.
translations.id: Untungnya, para paramedis menyelamatkan pesepeda itu.
translations.sv: Som tur är räddar ambulanspersonalen cyklisten.
translations.ro: Din fericire, paramedicii îl salvează pe biciclist.
translations.ja: 幸い、救急隊員が自転車の人を救っている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition (contraction of 'zu dem'), governs dative; introduces an adverbial PP ('Zum Glück') expressing manner/stance.
Common noun, neuter dative singular; object of 'Zum' in the fixed expression 'Zum Glück' functioning as a sentential adjunct.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate.
Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of 'Sanitäter' as subject.
Common noun, nominative plural; subject performing the action.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Radfahrer' as direct object.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'retten'.

I’m trying to save my phone.
Luckily, the paramedics rescue the cyclist.
